name: RollWorks ABM Platform API
what_it_does: Account-Based Marketing (ABM) platform by NextRoll with REST API — enabling B2B companies to identify and target accounts using machine learning, run programmatic ABM advertising, score accounts by fit and intent, and measure pipeline impact from account-level engagement.
use_cases: Syncing target account lists from Salesforce or HubSpot to RollWorks for ABM campaigns
Querying account fit scores and intent signals for sales development prioritization
Automating ABM audience updates based on CRM stage changes via API
Pulling campaign performance data for unified revenue attribution reporting
Integrating RollWorks account signals into SDR outreach sequencing workflows
not_for: Small businesses without named account selling motion
Companies with fewer than 100 target accounts
best_when: A B2B company using HubSpot or Salesforce wants ML-powered account scoring, programmatic ABM advertising, and tight CRM integration without a massive enterprise contract.
avoid_when: You need a full ABM platform with chat and email orchestration (use Terminus or Demandbase), or you sell consumer products.

auth.notes: OAuth2 authorization code flow via NextRoll identity. Scopes for read/write access to accounts, campaigns, and audiences. API key also available for server-to-server. Shared authentication with AdRoll (same NextRoll parent). Token refresh required.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; SMB-friendly pricing relative to enterprise ABM
pricing.paid_tiers: Starter from ~$975/month; Professional and Enterprise custom
pricing.notes: Division of NextRoll (formerly AdRoll). San Francisco-based. Founded 2011 (NextRoll). More accessible pricing than Terminus or Demandbase. ML-powered account scoring from NextRoll's data network. Native HubSpot and Salesforce integration. Strong mid-market ABM focus.

performance.rate_limits: OAuth2 rate limits; documented per endpoint

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for accounts, audiences, campaigns, and performance. OAuth2 with NextRoll identity (shared with AdRoll). Good documentation relative to ABM peers. ML account scores are computed — query API to understand scoring model inputs. Domain verification required for pixel tracking.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Account reads idempotent. Audience list management idempotent by account identifier. Campaign reads idempotent. Performance data reads idempotent. OAuth2 token refresh is stateful.
known_agent_gotchas: OAuth2 shared with AdRoll — scopes must include RollWorks-specific permissions
Domain verification pixel required for website visitor identification
Account fit scores use ML — initial scoring takes time after account list upload
Programmatic ad delivery has editorial review delays
GDPR consent required for EU account targeting — IP-based identification limited

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 and GDPR compliant. US data residency. OAuth2 with scopes for access control. CCPA compliant. Account-level targeting (no individual user tracking in ABM mode). NextRoll enterprise security standards.
